title: Set Load Balancing Algorithm via Annotation
description:
## Set Load Balancing Algorithm via Annotation

HAProxy supports multiple load balancing algorithms. For stateful workloads — such as sessions stored in-memory — `leastconn` or `source` (source-IP affinity) are often preferred over the default `roundrobin`.

**Your task:**

An `Ingress` named `shop-ingress` exists in the `haproxy-lab` namespace. Annotate it to use the **`leastconn`** load balancing algorithm.

The annotation key is: `haproxy.org/load-balance`

```bash
# Verify:
kubectl get ingress shop-ingress -n haproxy-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.annotations.haproxy\.org/load-balance}'
```

hints.title: Annotating with kubectl annotate
hints.body: Use kubectl annotate to add the load-balance annotation to the existing Ingress.
hints.command: kubectl annotate ingress shop-ingress -n haproxy-lab haproxy.org/load-balance=leastconn

setup_commands.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: shop-ingress
  namespace: haproxy-lab
spec:
  ingressClassName: haproxy
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: /shop
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: shop-svc
            port:
              number: 80
EOF

validation.description: Check that shop-ingress has the leastconn load-balance annotation
